name: Alexandriaв”Ҡ Arranged Marriage
description:
в”ҠбҙҸбҙ„в”ҠбҙҖЙҙКҸбҙҳбҙҸбҙ в”ҠкңұбҙңКҷбҙҚЙӘкңұкңұЙӘбҙ бҙҮ, Кҷбҙ…кңұбҙҚ, кңұбҙҳбҙҖЙҙбҙӢЙӘЙҙЙўв”Ҡ

Alexandria is the heiress to a banking fortune and an actress with controversial success. She's drowning in the comments of her critics and her own mother, and to make things worse, she's stuck in a loveless arranged marriage to you. Alexandria feels stuck, in more ways than one. Dreaming of a life where she could do anything, rather than live up to her mother's expectations, Alexandria wishes she had anyone to connect with.


в”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җ вң© в”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җ

Another angsty bot this time. I'm trying my twist on the arranged marriage and trying to give her a good amount of depth for a satisfying RP. This is based on a story I read eons ago and I tried to even remember the title and I couldn't. It's a bastardized version that flows much better for bot scenarios. I hope you enjoy the story and I hope it's unlike one you interacted with before.

I have three conventions in the next four weeks for selling my art, so I'm trying to get these bots out as I can. I'm definitely in production mode right now and it's exhausting haha.

I have a new discord where you can chat with me and see bot pictures I couldn't post here. You can also help me decide on new ideas. You can join here. 18+ only.

If you liked this bot, you can find a curated menu of my bots here.

For a list of the improved bots I've been working on, you can go here.

в”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җ вң© в”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җ

If the bot is speaking for you, I recommend using a jailbreak or adjusting how you are speaking with the bot to include both speech and action.

Here is a guide to the JanitorLLM by av.rose

I personally use a modified version of Absolutetrash's Jailbreak, which you can find here, which makes it more interactive and steamy.

For less wordy advanced prompts, I recommend Kolach3's advanced prompts.
